attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
TVOUTPUT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.ITEM_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.ASN_AUTOEXPIRE_FLG,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CAST (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM AS DATE) AS START_TV_DTM,
COALESCE (MAX (CAST (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM AS DATE) - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.ITEM_KEY, TVOUTPUT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') END_TV_DTM,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.ITEM_KEY,TVOUTPUT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM ASC) AS RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NII.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NII.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE


FROM
(
SELECT  
TVINPUT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
TVINPUT.ITEM_KEY,
TVINPUT.ASN_AUTOEXPIRE_FLG,
TVINPUT.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT,
TVINPUT.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,
TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME,
TVINPUT.START_TV_DTM,
TVINPUT.ACTION_CODE,
TVINPUT.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,TVINPUT.ITEM_KEY,TVINPUT.ASN_AUTOEXPIRE_FLG ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM
FROM
(

SELECT 
NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
NPRD.ITEM_KEY,
CAST(SCMSIB.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE)  AS START_TV_DTM,

(CASE WHEN SCMSIB.ASN_AUTOEXPIRE_FLAG = 1  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS ASN_AUTOEXPIRE_FLG ,


SCMSIB.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AS SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT,
SCMSIB.ORGANIZATION_ID AS SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,
SCMSIB.CREATE_DATETIME,
SCMSIB.ACTION_CODE,
'NE'  EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B SCMSIB


INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON SCMSIB.ORGANIZATION_ID       = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NPRD
ON SCMSIB.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID  = NPRD.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
AND NPRD.END_TV_DATE    = DATE '3500-01-01'


UNION ALL

SELECT 
NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
NPRD.ITEM_KEY,
CAST(ECMSIB.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DTM,

(CASE WHEN ECMSIB.ASN_AUTOEXPIRE_FLAG = 1  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS ASN_AUTOEXPIRE_FLG ,

ECMSIB.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID AS SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT,
ECMSIB.ORGANIZATION_ID AS SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,
ECMSIB.CREATE_DATETIME,
ECMSIB.ACTION_CODE,
ECMSIB.EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ECMSIB 

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON ECMSIB.ORGANIZATION_ID       = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NPRD
ON ECMSIB.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID  = NPRD.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
AND NPRD.END_TV_DATE     = DATE '3500-01-01'

UNION ALL

SELECT
NIIT .INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
NIIT.ITEM_KEY,
NIIT.START_TV_DTM,
NIIT.ASN_AUTOEXPIRE_FLG,
NIIT.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT,
NIIT.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,
NIIT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS  EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
'X' ACTION_CODE,
'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE


FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM_V1_TV NIIT 
WHERE NIIT.END_TV_DTM   = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)  

AND (NIIT.ITEM_KEY,NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY) IN  


(
SELECT NPRD.ITEM_KEY,
NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B SCMSIB



INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO 
ON SCMSIB.ORGANIZATION_ID = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NPRD
ON SCMSIB.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID  = NPRD.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
AND NPRD.END_TV_DATE     = DATE '3500-01-01'


UNION

SELECT NPRD.ITEM_KEY,
NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ECMSIB
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON ECMSIB.ORGANIZATION_ID       = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NPRD
ON ECMSIB.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID  = NPRD.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
AND NPRD.END_TV_DATE     = DATE '3500-01-01'
WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'

)

) TVINPUT

QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
TVINPUT.ITEM_KEY,TVINPUT.START_TV_DTM
ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC)=1
)TVOUTPUT

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM_V1_TV  NII
ON TVOUTPUT.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
AND TVOUTPUT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NII.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
AND NII.END_TV_DTM = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
WHERE ROW_NUM = 1

SCMSIB.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20, SCMSIB.BATCH_ID, SCMSIB.CREATE_DATETIME, SCMSIB.ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B SCMSIB
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 
       FROM	 $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NPRD 
   WHERE	 SCMSIB.SEGMENT1 = NPRD.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
	  AND	 NPRD.END_TV_DATE = DATE'3500-01-01'  
	  AND    SCMSIB.GLOBAL_NAME ='CG')
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 
		       FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO 
                      WHERE SCMSIB.ORGANIZATION_ID = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT 
       AND SCMSIB.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG')
